game_info.title: Red Dungeon
game_info.concept:
The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/redungeon/id1119569595

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!
Spike holes are underfoot it’s already too late …I’m dead! 
I take my last breath as the slime creature engulfs me….I’m dead!

Like always I’m brought back to try again….is someone helping me or do they just really want me to hurt?

Enter the world of Redungeon!


Features:
• Endless, random, increasingly difficult dungeons.
• Dozens of complex traps carefully designed to stop you.
• Unlockable characters, each with unique game-changing skills!
• Great music by Dave Cowen, the composer behind Leap Day and Rust Bucket. 
• Lots of angry, colourful pixels (and a few friendly ones).
• Swipe controls or on-screen buttons.


Important information:
This game contains third party advertising and cross promotion for other Nitrome games, both which can be removed via a one time In-App Purchase.
game_info.description:
Welcome to the Red Dungeon! You are an adventurer trapped in an endless, shifting dungeon. The ancient "Wall of Doom" is closing in from behind, devouring everything in its path. You must move quickly to survive.

Navigate the grid-based dungeon, avoid deadly traps like spikes and patrolling slimes, and collect gold coins for points. The dungeon is procedurally generated, so no two runs are the same. Don't stop moving, or the wall will catch you!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character (Up, Down, Left, Right)
Space: Wait/Skip turn (useful for timing traps)
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart game (when dead or game over)
ENTER: Start game from main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement and survival logic.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test bot will analyze the grid layout and entity positions to determine safe moves. It prioritizes moving Up (forward) to increase score but will move sideways or wait if the path is blocked by a wall or an active trap.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should successfully navigate through the initial segments of the dungeon, accumulating score. The test is considered successful if the player survives for at least 500 frames and score increases.

TEST_2.test_description: Stress test input handling and collision with random actions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot will generate random valid inputs (Arrow keys, Space) rapidly to test the input queue and ensure the game doesn't crash or clip through walls under chaotic conditions.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should remain stable without errors. The player will likely die quickly, but the "Game Over" state should trigger correctly without console errors.
